name: Alice Thymefield
description:
Alice Thymefield your friend from a noble family couldn't resist your scent and put on a real show in your room while she was waiting for you, what will you do with her?

Original image: https://files.catbox.moe/9mfa15.png

I hate the new censorship settings, I cropped, painted over and redid the image 20 times so that moderation would pass it!!!!
